props.name: padding
props.description: Specifies the distance (in pixels) around the element that activates the magnet pull.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the magnet effect when set to true.

props.name: magnetStrength
props.description: Controls the strength of the pull; higher values reduce movement, lower values increase it.

props.name: activeTransition
props.description: CSS transition applied to the element when the magnet is active.

props.name: inactiveTransition
props.description: CSS transition applied when the magnet is inactive (mouse out of range).

props.name: wrapperClassName
props.description: Optional CSS class name for the outermost wrapper element.

props.name: innerClassName
props.description: Optional CSS class name for the moving (inner) element.

props.name: children
props.description: The content (JSX) to be displayed inside the magnetized element.
